intent:
You are on BoatTrader search results. Process the {ORDINAL} listing.

WHAT TO CLICK — Listing cards are LARGE rectangles in the CENTER of the page with:
- A boat PHOTO on the left (~150px wide)
- Year, Make, Model TEXT (e.g. '2022 Grady-White Freedom 235')
- A dollar PRICE (e.g. '$145,000')
- A location (e.g. 'Miami, FL')
Click the TITLE TEXT of the {ORDINAL} card. Do NOT click the photo image.

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- The boat PHOTO (opens a gallery trap — click the TITLE TEXT instead)
- Facebook/Instagram/Twitter icons (small 20-40px colored squares in footer or sidebar)
- 'Research', 'Sell My Boat', or dropdown menus in the top header bar
- Advertisement banners or external dealer links

STEPS — Do these IN ORDER:
1. click() the {ORDINAL} listing's TITLE TEXT (the boat name, NOT the photo).
2. You are now on a detail page. scroll(direction="down", amount=5) aggressively past photos to text sections.
3. Look for 'Description', 'Seller Notes', 'Full Specs', or 'More Details'. READ the text.
4. Note: Year, Make, Model, Price, and any Phone number or Seller name if visible.
5. key_press(keys="alt+left") to go BACK to the search results page.
6. Call done() with your findings.

OUTPUT:
done(success=true, summary="VIABLE | Year: 2022 | Make: Grady-White | Model: Freedom 235 | Price: $145000 | Phone: 305-321-4567 | Seller: John Smith | URL: https://www.boattrader.com/boat/...")

Note: Phone and Seller are OPTIONAL. If not found, use 'none':
done(success=true, summary="VIABLE | Year: 2022 | Make: Grady-White | Model: Freedom 235 | Price: $145000 | Phone: none | Seller: none")

If error page: done(success=true, summary="SKIPPED | error reason")
If no more listings: done(success=false, summary="no more listings")

RULES:
- Click TITLE TEXT, never the photo image (opens gallery trap)
- If you see a photo gallery ('1 of N'): key_press(keys="Escape"), then key_press(keys="alt+left"). Do NOT try to close it.
- If you see 404/error: key_press(keys="alt+left") immediately, then done() with SKIPPED
- If off-site (facebook/instagram): key_press(keys="alt+left") immediately
- Cookie popup: click Accept ONCE, max 2 steps
- Scroll DOWN aggressively on detail pages — data is BELOW photos

intent:
You are on BoatTrader search results. Process the {ORDINAL} listing.

WHAT TO CLICK — Listing cards are LARGE rectangles in the CENTER of the page with:
- A boat PHOTO on the left (~150px wide)
- Year, Make, Model TEXT (e.g. '2022 Grady-White Freedom 235')
- A dollar PRICE (e.g. '$145,000')
- A location (e.g. 'Miami, FL')
Click the TITLE TEXT of the {ORDINAL} card. Do NOT click the photo image.

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- The boat PHOTO (opens a gallery trap — click the TITLE TEXT instead)
- Facebook/Instagram/Twitter icons (small 20-40px colored squares in footer or sidebar)
- 'Research', 'Sell My Boat', or dropdown menus in the top header bar
- Advertisement banners or external dealer links

STEPS — Do these IN ORDER:
1. click() the {ORDINAL} listing's TITLE TEXT (the boat name, NOT the photo).
2. You are now on a detail page. scroll(direction="down", amount=5) aggressively past photos to text sections.
3. Look for 'Description', 'Seller Notes', 'Full Specs', or 'More Details'. READ the text.
4. Note: Year, Make, Model, Price, and any Phone number or Seller name if visible.
5. key_press(keys="alt+left") to go BACK to the search results page.
6. Call done() with your findings.

OUTPUT:
done(success=true, summary="VIABLE | Year: 2022 | Make: Grady-White | Model: Freedom 235 | Price: $145000 | Phone: 305-321-4567 | Seller: John Smith | URL: https://www.boattrader.com/boat/...")

Note: Phone and Seller are OPTIONAL. If not found, use 'none':
done(success=true, summary="VIABLE | Year: 2022 | Make: Grady-White | Model: Freedom 235 | Price: $145000 | Phone: none | Seller: none")

If error page: done(success=true, summary="SKIPPED | error reason")
If no more listings: done(success=false, summary="no more listings")

You are on BoatTrader search results. Process the {ORDINAL} listing.

WHAT TO CLICK — Listing cards are LARGE rectangles in the CENTER of the page with:
- A boat PHOTO on the left (~150px wide)
- Year, Make, Model TEXT (e.g. '2022 Grady-White Freedom 235')
- A dollar PRICE (e.g. '$145,000')
- A location (e.g. 'Miami, FL')
Click the TITLE TEXT of the {ORDINAL} card. Do NOT click the photo image.

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- The boat PHOTO (opens a gallery trap — click the TITLE TEXT instead)
- Facebook/Instagram/Twitter icons (small 20-40px colored squares in footer or sidebar)
- 'Research', 'Sell My Boat', or dropdown menus in the top header bar
- Advertisement banners or external dealer links

STEPS — Do these IN ORDER:
1. click() the {ORDINAL} listing's TITLE TEXT (the boat name, NOT the photo).
2. You are now on a detail page. scroll(direction="down", amount=5) aggressively past photos to text sections.
3. Look for 'Description', 'Seller Notes', 'Full Specs', or 'More Details'. READ the text.
4. Note: Year, Make, Model, Price, and any Phone number or Seller name if visible.
5. key_press(keys="alt+left") to go BACK to the search results page.
6. Call done() with your findings.

OUTPUT:
done(success=true, summary="VIABLE | Year: 2022 | Make: Grady-White | Model: Freedom 235 | Price: $145000 | Phone: 305-321-4567 | Seller: John Smith | URL: https://www.boattrader.com/boat/...")

Note: Phone and Seller are OPTIONAL. If not found, use 'none':
done(success=true, summary="VIABLE | Year: 2022 | Make: Grady-White | Model: Freedom 235 | Price: $145000 | Phone: none | Seller: none")

If error page: done(success=true, summary="SKIPPED | error reason")
If no more listings: done(success=false, summary="no more listings")

RULES:
- Click TITLE TEXT, never the photo image (opens gallery trap)
- If you see a photo gallery ('1 of N'): key_press(keys="Escape"), then key_press(keys="alt+left"). Do NOT try to close it.
- If you see 404/error: key_press(keys="alt+left") immediately, then done() with SKIPPED
- If off-site (facebook/instagram): key_press(keys="alt+left") immediately
- Cookie popup: click Accept ONCE, max 2 steps
- Scroll DOWN aggressively on detail pages — data is BELOW photos

You are on BoatTrader search results. Process the {ORDINAL} listing.

WHAT TO CLICK — Listing cards are LARGE rectangles in the CENTER of the page with:
- A boat PHOTO on the left (~150px wide)
- Year, Make, Model TEXT (e.g. '2022 Grady-White Freedom 235')
- A dollar PRICE (e.g. '$145,000')
- A location (e.g. 'Miami, FL')
Click the TITLE TEXT of the {ORDINAL} card. Do NOT click the photo image.

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- The boat PHOTO (opens a gallery trap — click the TITLE TEXT instead)
- Facebook/Instagram/Twitter icons (small 20-40px colored squares in footer or sidebar)
- 'Research', 'Sell My Boat', or dropdown menus in the top header bar
- Advertisement banners or external dealer links

STEPS — Do these IN ORDER:
1. click() the {ORDINAL} listing's TITLE TEXT (the boat name, NOT the photo).
2. You are now on a detail page. scroll(direction="down", amount=5) aggressively past photos to text sections.

4. Note: Year, Make, Model, Price, and any Phone number or Seller name if visible.
5. key_press(keys="alt+left") to go BACK to the search results page.
6. Call done() with your findings.

done(success=true, summary="VIABLE | Year: 2022 | Make: Grady-White | Model: Freedom 235 | Price: $145000 | Phone: 305-321-4567 | Seller: John Smith | URL: https://www.boattrader.com/boat/...")

Note: Phone and Seller are OPTIONAL. If not found, use 'none':
done(success=true, summary="VIABLE | Year: 2022 | Make: Grady-White | Model: Freedom 235 | Price: $145000 | Phone: none | Seller: none")

If error page: done(success=true, summary="SKIPPED | error reason")
If no more listings: done(success=false, summary="no more listings")

RULES:
- Click TITLE TEXT, never the photo image (opens gallery trap)
- If you see a photo gallery ('1 of N'): key_press(keys="Escape"), then key_press(keys="alt+left"). Do NOT try to close it.
- If you see 404/error: key_press(keys="alt+left") immediately, then done() with SKIPPED
- If off-site (facebook/instagram): key_press(keys="alt+left") immediately
- Cookie popup: click Accept ONCE, max 2 steps
- Scroll DOWN aggressively on detail pages — data is BELOW photos

intent:
You are on BoatTrader search results. Process the {ORDINAL} listing.

WHAT TO CLICK — Listing cards are LARGE rectangles in the CENTER of the page with:
- A boat PHOTO on the left (~150px wide)
- Year, Make, Model TEXT (e.g. '2022 Grady-White Freedom 235')
- A dollar PRICE (e.g. '$145,000')
- A location (e.g. 'Miami, FL')
Click the TITLE TEXT of the {ORDINAL} card. Do NOT click the photo image.

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- The boat PHOTO (opens a gallery trap — click the TITLE TEXT instead)
- Facebook/Instagram/Twitter icons (small 20-40px colored squares in footer or sidebar)
- 'Research', 'Sell My Boat', or dropdown menus in the top header bar
- Advertisement banners or external dealer links

STEPS — Do these IN ORDER:
1. click() the {ORDINAL} listing's TITLE TEXT (the boat name, NOT the photo).
2. You are now on a detail page. scroll(direction="down", amount=5) aggressively past photos to text sections.
3. Look for 'Description', 'Seller Notes', 'Full Specs', or 'More Details'. READ the text.
4. Note: Year, Make, Model, Price, and any Phone number or Seller name if visible.
5. key_press(keys="alt+left") to go BACK to the search results page.
6. Call done() with your findings.

done(success=true, summary="VIABLE | Year: 2022 | Make: Grady-White | Model: Freedom 235 | Price: $145000 | Phone: 305-321-4567 | Seller: John Smith | URL: https://www.boattrader.com/boat/...")

Note: Phone and Seller are OPTIONAL. If not found, use 'none':
